combined_text: Roberts Blossom dies at 87; character played neighbor in 'Home Alone' "Roberts Blossom dies at 87; character played neighbor in 'Home Alone'Roberts Blossom also won three Obie Awards for his off-Broadway work and performed on Broadway and TV and in many other films. He was a poet whose works were published in several books. July 14, 2011 | Dennis Mc Lellan, Los Angele
